top.headline: Falklands veteran hopes King can persuade Trump to 'back down'
top.summary: Simon Weston says reports the US is reviewing the UK's claim to the territory makes his sacrifice feel "irrelevant".

soccer.headline: All eyes on Spurs & West Ham? 'Unbelievable' Forest edge towards safety
soccer.summary: After Nottingham Forest's stunning win at Sunderland, is the Premier League relegation battle now a two-horse race?

us.headline: Iran's foreign minister awaits U.S. delegation to Pakistan for peace talks
us.summary: Iran's Abbas Araghchi arrived in Islamabad on Friday, as the White House confirmed Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner will travel there Saturday to try to "move the ball forward towards a deal."

world.headline: Nato says 'no provision' to expel members after report US could seek to suspend Spain
world.summary: An internal Pentagon email reportedly outlines options to punish allies over a perceived lack of support for Iran war.

business.headline: China car giant BYD says it can thrive without US
business.summary: With the price of fuel rising China's BYD says it is positioning itself to benefit from the global shift away from fossil fuels.

tech.headline: The viral manifesto of 'anti-woke' tech boss with NHS and defence contracts
tech.summary: The boss of the controversial tech company with UK government contracts published a 22-point plan on the future of the West.

science.headline: First ever talks to ditch fossil fuels as UN deadlock deepens
science.summary: Some 60 countries are meeting in Colombia as frustration grows with lack of progress in tackling climate change

top.headline: Slow news is good news.
top.summary: Most headlines age out within hours. A single, considered story per day keeps you informed without burning the afternoon.

top.headline: Welcome to One News.
top.summary: One top story per day per category. No infinite feed, no notifications, no scrolling.
